---
title: "Archive"
subtitle: "Earlier and superseded pieces. Still here, still readable, just off the main feed."
listing:
  contents:
    - "tool-healthfulness-map/index.qmd"
    - "same-bread-five-verdicts/index.qmd"
  template: _listing-cards.ejs.md
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, reading-time, categories, fresh-engines, topics, series, part, card-subtitle, companion]
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.fi-standfirst}
Work that has been **replaced by a newer piece** or has simply aged out of the
main rotation. These pages keep their original links and stay live. For the
current work, see [Insights](index.qmd).
:::
